# sdwan_bridge_feature_template (Resource)

This resource can manage a Bridge feature template.
  - Minimum SD-WAN Manager version: `15.0.0`

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "sdwan_bridge_feature_template" "example" {
  name                  = "Example"
  description           = "My Example"
  device_types          = ["vedge-C8000V"]
  bridge_name           = "example"
  age_out_time          = 300
  maximum_mac_addresses = 1234
  vlan_id               = 1
  interface_to_bind_to_bridging_domain = [
    {
      interface_name      = "interface_example"
      description         = "My Description"
      native_vlan_support = false
      static_mac_address = [
        {
          mac_address = "0000.00000.0000"
        }
      ]
      shutdown = true
    }
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `description` (String) The description of the feature template
- `device_types` (Set of String) List of supported device types
  - Choices: `vedge-C8000V`, `vedge-C8300-1N1S-4T2X`, `vedge-C8300-1N1S-6T`, `vedge-C8300-2N2S-6T`, `vedge-C8300-2N2S-4T2X`, `vedge-C8500-12X4QC`, `vedge-C8500-12X`, `vedge-C8500-20X6C`, `vedge-C8500L-8S4X`, `vedge-C8200-1N-4T`, `vedge-C8200L-1N-4T`
- `name` (String) The name of the feature template

### Optional

- `age_out_time` (Number) Set when a MAC table entry ages out
  - Range: `10`-`4096`
  - Default value: `300`
- `age_out_time_variable` (String) Variable name
- `bridge_name` (String) Configure bridge description
- `bridge_name_variable` (String) Variable name
- `interface_to_bind_to_bridging_domain` (Attributes List) Configure interface to associate with bridging domain (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--interface_to_bind_to_bridging_domain))
- `maximum_mac_addresses` (Number) Set maximum number of MAC addresses the bridging domain can learn
  - Range: `0`-`4096`
  - Default value: `1024`
- `maximum_mac_addresses_variable` (String) Variable name
- `vlan_id` (Number) Set VLAN identifier associated with bridging domain
  - Range: `1`-`4095`
- `vlan_id_variable` (String) Variable name

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The id of the feature template
- `template_type` (String) The template type
- `version` (Number) The version of the feature template

<a id="nestedatt--interface_to_bind_to_bridging_domain"></a>
### Nested Schema for `interface_to_bind_to_bridging_domain`

Optional:

- `description` (String) Configure interface description
- `description_variable` (String) Variable name
- `interface_name` (String) Configure the Gigabit Ethernet interface name
- `interface_name_variable` (String) Variable name
- `native_vlan_support` (Boolean) Configure interface to carry untagged traffic
  - Default value: `false`
- `native_vlan_support_variable` (String) Variable name
- `optional` (Boolean) Indicates if list item is considered optional.
- `shutdown` (Boolean) Enable or disable interface in bridging domain
  - Default value: `true`
- `shutdown_variable` (String) Variable name
- `static_mac_address` (Attributes List) Add static MAC address entries for interface (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--interface_to_bind_to_bridging_domain--static_mac_address))

<a id="nestedatt--interface_to_bind_to_bridging_domain--static_mac_address"></a>
### Nested Schema for `interface_to_bind_to_bridging_domain.static_mac_address`

Optional:

- `mac_address` (String) Set MAC address
- `mac_address_variable` (String) Variable name
- `optional` (Boolean) Indicates if list item is considered optional.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
terraform import sdwan_bridge_feature_template.example "f6b2c44c-693c-4763-b010-895aa3d236bd"
```
